data.name: label2.Text
data.value: A man from the future "Sam Rockwell" arrives at a Los Angeles diner with a DIY retro-futuristic suit and a desperate mission. Claiming to have lived through countless failed timelines, he recruits a mismatched group of patrons including a depressed party entertainer and a school-teaching couple to join his "Doomsday Squad." Together, they must navigate a surreal journey through time to stop a rogue artificial intelligence before it triggers a technological singularity. Directed by Gore Verbinski, the film is a gonzo, high-stakes romp through a tech-obsessed apocalypse.
